entities.woman: a woman standing at a fork in the path
entities.signpost: a wooden signpost with two arrows

scenes.title: The Crossroads
scenes.background_prompt: A countryside path that splits into two directions at a fork, with a wooden signpost, wild grass on both sides, a stone wall, and rolling hills. Misty morning. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A countryside path on a misty morning. The path reaches a fork and splits into two directions. A wooden signpost stands at the junction with two arrow-shaped signs pointing in opposite directions — one reads 'VILLAGE 2km' and the other reads 'FOREST TRAIL'. A woman of about thirty in a tan hiking jacket, dark leggings, and walking boots stands at the fork, facing the signpost. She has stopped mid-stride, one hand resting on her chin, head tilted slightly, clearly weighing her options. Her expression is contemplative — not lost, but genuinely uncertain about which path to choose. Wild grass and purple wildflowers grow on both sides of the path. A low stone wall runs along the left path, and the right path curves into a dark line of trees. Mist hangs low over the rolling hills beyond.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place woman at the fork in the path, standing and facing the signpost, one hand on chin, head tilted, expression contemplative. Stopped mid-stride.
